passes.title: American Heritage Museum
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 4 people for free . Children under 6 are always admitted for free .
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at and returned to the library .
This pass is not limited by date or time .
This pass can be used for special programs , provided the program is being held on-site during the Museum's regular operating hours .

passes.title: The Aviation Museum Of New Hampshire
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 4  people (adults or children) at half price per person.
This is an e-ticket  which does not need   to be picked up at the library .
This pass is only valid for use  on the date for which you reserve it.
You must reserve your visit  on the museum's website after receiving the pass .
This pass is funded by the Friends of the Stoneham Library.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to 3 people at half the regular admission price per person. Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
This pass is an e-ticket which does not need to be picked up at the library .
During the school year, the museum is closed on Mondays, unless otherwise noted on their calendar. From June 22 -- September 1, the museum is open 7 days a week with free admission on Friday evenings. Operating hours can be found on the Discovery Museum website .
Please be advised, as of 1/7/25 the museum no longer accepts advance reservations for admission.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 3 people at half the regular admission price per person. Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
This pass is an e-ticket which does not need to be picked up at the library .

During the school year, the museum is closed on Mondays, unless otherwise noted on their calendar. From June 22 -- September 1, the museum is open 7 days a week with free admission on Friday evenings. Operating hours can be found on the Discovery Museum website .
Please be advised, as of 1/7/25 the museum no longer accepts advance reservations for admission.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
source_phrases: The coupon code covers the cost of up to 12 tickets per mainstage show. There is a limit of 2 tickets per person.

This pass is NOT a reservation and does not need to be picked up at the library. You must reserve a ticket for a specific day and time prior to the performance you wish to attend. Tickets must be reserved by calling the Greater Boston Stage Company at (781) 279-2200. The GBSC Box Office is open noon to 4 pm Tuesday through Friday. Your tickets are only valid for the date and time you reserve.
This season's Main Stage shows:
Featherbaby opens on Friday, September 12th and runs through Sunday, December 28th.
Murder for Two opens on Friday, October 5th and runs through Sunday, November 9th.
An Irish Carol opens on Friday, December 5th and runs through Sunday, December 21st.
Wait Until Dark opens on Friday, March 6th and runs through Sunday, March 22nd.
What the Constitution Means to Me opens on Friday, April 10th and runs through Sunday, April 26th.
Annie opens on Friday, May 29th and runs through Sunday, June 28th.

passes.title: The House Of Seven Gables
passes.benefit_text:
The pass admits up to 4 people at $5 per person . Children under 18 are admitted for free .
This is an e-voucher that does not need to be picked up at the library . You will receive the pass in an email once you have placed your reservation.
This pass is only valid for use on the date that is printed on the pass . 
The museum is closed on Tuesdays.
This pass is funded by the Friends of the Stoneham Library.
source_phrases: The pass admits up to 4 people at $5 per person . Children under 18 are admitted for free .
This is an e-voucher that does not need to be picked up at the library . You will receive the pass in an email once you have placed your reservation.
This pass is only valid for use on the date that is printed on the pass .
The museum is closed on Tuesdays.
This pass is funded by the Friends of the Stoneham Library.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
source_phrases: No pass is needed. Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount.
Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.
Need a library card? Visit our website to learn more.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
source_phrases: This pass admits one car for free parking at any Massachusetts State Park. See a list of Massachusetts State Parks here .
This is a physical pass which must be picked up at and returned to the library .
This pass is valid for use on any day/time until the date printed on the pass .

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Children 6 and under are admitted free.
This pass admits 2 adults  at a discounted rate of $10 per person (general admission and special exhibition)  and up to 4 children 7-17 at $10 per person (special exhibition) . There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission, currently $10.
This is an e-voucher that does not need to be picked up at the library . You will receive the pass in an email once you have placed your reservation.
Follow the instructions in the email.
source_phrases: Children 6 and under are admitted free.

This pass admits 2 adults  at a discounted rate of $10 per person (general admission and special exhibition)  and up to 4 children 7-17 at $10 per person (special exhibition) . There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission, currently $10.
This is an e-voucher that does not need to be picked up at the library . You will receive the pass in an email once you have placed your reservation.
Follow the instructions in the email.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
source_phrases: This is a physical pass and must be picked up from and returned to the library .
This pass is valid for regular on-site rentals at all locations during regular hours of operation during the boating season (the first weekend in May through mid-October, weather permitting).
This pass is not valid for Fourth of July Fireworks Rentals or any other special event or activity .
Hours of Operation and Directions:
Stoneham: Spot Pond  (closed weekdays after Labor Day)
Boston: Allston/Brighton
Cambridge: Kendall Square
Medford: Condon Shell  (closed weekdays after Labor Day)
Newton: Historic Boathouse
Somerville: Blessing of the Bay  (closed weekdays after Labor Day)
Waltham: Moody Street Dam  (closed weekdays after Labor Day)

Anyone using this pass can bring guests in the boat they are renting at no charge as long as the boat rented can accommodate the number of guests (for example, an individual kayak member and a guest may rent one double kayak at no extra charge). All boats are included.

passes.title: Paddle Boston
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 2 adults at a discount rate of $12 per person . Children age 16 and under are free .
This pass is an e-voucher that does not need to be picked up at or returned to the library .

You must book a date and time for your visit after you have reserved the pass . You can do so by visiting the PEM website or by calling (978) 542-1511 . On the PEM ticket page, enter the unique promo code you received upon reserving the pass, and then select your discounted admission tickets. Timed tickets to Yin Yu Tang: A Chinese Home are included with museum admission and may be selected as part of the online checkout process.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 6 people at a discounted rate of $14.00 for adults or seniors , $11.75 for children 3-14 .
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at and returned to the library .
Present the pass at the ticket booth for discounted admission.
Passes are not accepted in the month of October.

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 2 adults and 2 children under 18  at an equivalent to a Trustees Family Membership admission price at Trustees properties that charge and admission fee. This pass is valid for admission only; it is not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, inns, campgrounds, at special events or programs, on equipment rentals, or in place of any permits or passes.
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the library and can be discarded after use .
This pass is not limited by date or time .
This pass is valid at any of 100+ Trustees properties . Hours vary by location. To see a list of Trustees properties, click here.

passes.title: Trustees Of The Reservations
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 6 people for a discounted rate of $9.00 for adults and $6.00 for children .
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the library and can be discarded after use .
This pass is not limited by date or time , but can only be used once .
This pass offers admission to either the Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo .
